questions.question: What is the role of benchmark datasets in establishing the State of the Art in AI? (2-3 marks)
expectedPoints: Provide a standardized and fair way to compare different AI models.
They define the tasks and metrics (e.g., accuracy, BLEU score) for evaluation.
A model claims SOTA status by achieving the highest score on a recognized benchmark.

questions.question: Discuss the current State of the Art in Natural Language Processing (NLP). In your answer, describe the key technology enabling it, its main capabilities, and one major limitation. (5-10 marks)
expectedPoints: Key Technology: Transformer architecture (e.g., models like GPT-4, PaLM).
Capability 1: High-quality text generation and summarization.
Capability 2: Sophisticated question answering and knowledge retrieval.
Limitation: Tendency to 'hallucinate' or generate plausible but incorrect information.
Limitation: Capturing and amplifying biases from training data.
Limitation: High computational cost for training and deployment.
